EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Information about a {protocol} packet flow from {src.host} to {dst.host} is updated
A {protocol} translation from {src.host} to {assigned_src_ip} is closed
A {protocol} translation from {src.host} to {assigned_src_ip} is created
A {protocol} packet flow from {src.host} to {dst.host} is detected
A {protocol} packet flow from {src.host} to {dst.host} is closed
A {protocol} translation from {dst.host} to {assigned_dst_ip} is closed
A {protocol} translation from {dst.host} to {assigned_dst_ip} is created
A {protocol} packet flow from {src.host} to {dst.host} is created
A {protocol} packet flow from {src.host} to {dst.host} is denied
